word: G4354 - προσλαλέω - proslaléō - pros-lal-eh'-o - Speak to

sections.paragraph:
- Original: προσλαλέω

- Transliteration: Proslaleo

- Phonetic: pros-lal-eh'-o

- Definition:

1. to speak to

- Origin: from G4314 and G2980

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G4314 and G2980; to talk to that is converse with: - speak to (with).
